candidates.why: Direct match to total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Malformed/combined label for non-current assets, not current assets total.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.

candidates.row_label: Gains and losses on disposal of non- current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow item, unrelated to current assets.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Cash component only; less complete than total cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Short-term investments comparable to cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Component of cash equivalents, not the full total.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance matches cash, but balance sheet label is preferred.

variables.notes: Preferred balance sheet total for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.why: Direct match to total current liabilities.
Only a component/subheading, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct semantic match to current portion of long-term debt; excludes generic current liabilities and does not mention leases.
Could be short-term financing debt, but may already be embedded in broader current debt disclosures; risk of double counting if combined with a total/maturities line.
Current bond issues can represent short-term debt, but may overlap with current maturities disclosures.
Current bank loans are financing debt, but may overlap with current maturities disclosures.
Broad current debt subtotal, but explicitly includes lease liabilities in the components, which should be excluded for baseline STD.

variables.notes: Selected the cleanest non-lease current debt label available. Manual review because current debt is also split into components (e.g., Commercial papers, Bond issues, Loans from financial institutions), and overlap versus this maturities line is not fully certain.

candidates.why: Direct match to current tax liabilities / taxes payable on the balance sheet.
Tax-related but appears non-current/unclear and is blank here; less suitable than current income tax liabilities.
Deferred taxes are excluded from taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because no TXP candidates were provided; this is a clear current taxes payable label.

candidates.why: Direct reported PPE total on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE line.
Could include ROU assets or other tangible assets and is gross rather than preferred total/net PPE.
Cash flow investing item, not a balance sheet stock of PPE.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of tangible assets
candidates.why: Cash flow investing item, not PPE balance.

variables.notes: Clear PPE total; preferable to gross tangible asset lines.

candidates.why: Direct match to total assets on the balance sheet.
Direct net cash flow from operating activities; best match for operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital Changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because the shortlisted line is only a pre-working-capital subtotal; this label is the final net cash flow from operating activities.
